epEvidence.roleStoryEvidence: Operations intelligence MES readiness domain card plus docs/specs/mes.md future-scope capability matrix and routeCoverage rows in this file.
epEvidence.accessibilityEvidence: e2e/fixtures/ux.ts assertNoAxeViolations, web lint UI-string gate, and module-specific component/e2e tests
epEvidence.gapHandling: MES remains future scope until org/people/assets/inventory/ERP/workflow/policy/import foundations are production-grade; /intelligence shows readiness/guardrails without exposing an isolated MES screen.

trackedGaps.rule: May document missing maturity in specs, but product UI must show actionable lifecycle/setup states, not backend-missing dead panels.
Finance/procurement/accounting gaps stay in backlog or guided setup, not demo panels.
G026 closes the first CX/reporting/BI UI maturity slice; future backend analytics must retain source-object links and role-story tests before exposure.

G012 closes the first governed operations-intelligence UI foundation; AI/MES/optimization stay recommendation/scenario and future-scope only until deterministic data/workflow/observability foundations are verified.

noNonFunctionalTextWalls: 허브는 메신저·메일·티켓을 별도 데모로 분리하지 않고
bannedProductCopyPolicy.allowedSetupStates: Configuration-gated states are allowed only when the user has a concrete setup or recovery action, for example mail server settings.
